name: Pick Up & Drop Off Trnsprtn
recent_news: No web presence or news identified; appears to be a micro sole-proprietor van/livery operation in West Chicago at 4936 W Chicago Ave.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in: 2 employees / ~$151k revenue / no website suggests a 1-2 van micro operator, likely sole proprietor IEP or NEMT shuttle. Too small to add meaningful route density for Summit; would only matter as driver/contract pickup if Summit lacks Chicago west-side capacity.

name: Power Transportation Inc
recent_news: No school-bus or M&A footprint identified; multiple unrelated trucking/freight firms share the Franklin Park ZIP. Manta lists a similarly named 'Power Express' as a 2-employee, ~$130k-revenue micro carrier.
fit_notes: Not an attractive tuck-in: micro 2-person operator in Franklin Park with no district contracts surfaced. Likely IEP/NEMT van service; insufficient scale or route density for Summit. Pass unless geographic gap-fill is a stated need.

name: Ready To Go Transportation
recent_news: No school-district contract or M&A activity found. Several unrelated 'Ready 2 Go' / 'Ready To Go' transport entities exist (GA, CA, USDOT carriers) but none confirmed at the Dolton, IL 154th St address. NPI / BBB hits are for the Augusta, GA company, not the IL entity.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in: 2-person, ~$151k-revenue Dolton operator with no confirmed school contracts. Most likely a single-van NEMT / IEP curb-to-curb service. No succession or platform fit; pass.

name: Simms Transportation
recent_news: Tinley Park residential address (8318 Aster Ln) signals a home-based sole proprietor. A separate 'Simms Transportation' is registered as an NPI ambulance/NEMT provider; a similarly named 'Simms Transportation' Yelp listing is in nearby Hazel Crest. No school district contract identified.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in: looks like a 1-2 vehicle home-based NEMT/IEP livery, not a contracted school-bus operator. No fleet scale, route density, or succession lever. Pass.

name: Sure Transportation
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER shows a 'SURE TRANSPORTATION LLC' (USDOT 4123482) but cannot confirm match to the 155 S Halsted, Chicago Heights address. SIP Transport (also Chicago Heights) is a more visible local special-needs/IEP operator but is a different company. No M&A or district contract news found.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in: 2-person Chicago Heights operator with no confirmed school district contracts or web presence. Most likely a single-van NEMT/IEP shuttle. Compare to SIP Transport (also Chicago Heights) which has real special-needs scale and would be a more relevant prospect. Pass.
